  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Echo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/EventLogging mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \

  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Echo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --skip-zuul \
  --skip-deps \
  --run selenium
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/cldr \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true

= install is running: cmd=(docker run "${QUIBBLE_DOCKER_FLAGS[@]}" --rm --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord "${QUIBBLE_VOLUMES[@]}" -e ZUUL_PROJECT="${repo}" "$QUIBBLE_IMAGE" ${QUIBBLE_DRY_RUN[@]+"${QUIBBLE_DRY_RUN[@]}"} --resolve-requires --command true ${deps[@]+"${deps[@]}"})

========================================
= install is running: print_quibble_command docker run -it --rm --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord -v $PWD/cache:/cache -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/GeoData docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest --dry-run --resolve-requires --command true mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/Elastica

========================================
= install is running: local _xtrace_was_on=

========================================
= install is running: case "$-" in

========================================
= install is running: _xtrace_was_on=1

========================================
= install is running: set +x
########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/GeoData \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/Elastica
########################################

  --command true

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/PageTriage \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/ORES mediawiki/extensions/PageViewInfo mediawiki/extensions/WikiLove
########################################

docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/Thanks \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/Echo mediawiki/extensions/AbuseFilter mediawiki/extensions/Flow mediawiki/extensions/MobileFrontend mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor
########################################

========================================
= install is running: print_quibble_command docker run -it --rm --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord -v $PWD/cache:/cache -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseMediaInfo docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest --dry-run --resolve-requires --command true mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseCirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/cldr mediawiki/extensions/Elastica mediawiki/extensions/Wikibase

========================================
= install is running: local _xtrace_was_on=

========================================
= install is running: case "$-" in

========================================
= install is running: _xtrace_was_on=1

========================================
= install is running: set +x
########################################
docker run \
  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \
  -v $PWD/log:/workspace/log \
  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \
  -v $PWD/src:/workspace/src \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseMediaInfo \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --resolve-requires \
  --command true \
  mediawiki/extensions/UniversalLanguageSelector mediawiki/extensions/WikibaseCirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/CirrusSearch mediawiki/extensions/cldr mediawiki/extensions/Elastica mediawiki/extensions/Wikibase
########################################

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v $PWD/cache:/cache \

  -v $PWD/ref:/srv/git:ro \

  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/extensions/VisualEditor \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --skip-zuul \
  --skip-deps \
  --run selenium
